name: Tales of Gluttony -Fat Fur Fantasy RPG-
description:
-Thank you so much for the 50 followers!!!-

This is by far the most experimental bot that I've done so far, so I'm not sure how well it will work. The basis is that you living in a world that has been cursed, slowly fattening up its inhabitants by the evil wizard Bartholomew. It's up to you to stop the wizard and break the curse, or to join him and watch as the world is slowly fattened up to immobility.

Once again please feel free to leave a review, comment or suggestion below. If this bot does well, I might consider doing more RPG type stuff.

Tags: Furry, Fat Fur, Fantasy, Weight Gain, Obesity, Gluttony, Magic
creator: corkboarf
